summary: Tested Achievements page redesign: UP NEXT pattern, badge grid layout, backend badges endpoint. All 6 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend renders correctly with 2-col badge grid, 3 UP NEXT cards sorted by remaining, compact locked grid, and zero horizontal overflow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Achievements page redesign fully working. Backend GET /api/badges returns locked badges with current/target/remaining fields sorted by remaining asc. Frontend shows: 2-col earned badge grid (width:47%), UP NEXT section with exactly 3 horizontal cards (1 away, 3 away, 5 away), '8 MORE TO UNLOCK' compact icon grid, no horizontal overflow. All sections render correctly.

verified_features.earned_badges_2col_grid: PASS - First Rep and Week One visible as 2-column layout
verified_features.up_next_3_cards: PASS - exactly 3 cards with '1 away', '3 away', '5 away' labels
verified_features.up_next_fields: PASS - icon/ring, name, desc, current/target, X away all visible
verified_features.compact_locked_section: PASS - '8 MORE TO UNLOCK' section with compact icon circles
verified_features.backend_locked_sorted: PASS - sorted by remaining asc (verified in tests)
